steps.t: Crystals and metal ingots can be found near the forge in Vérnozal. You should collect crystals and metal ingots to make crystal torches.
A forge can be found in Vérnozal. You should forge crystal torches for dwarf explorers at the forge.
Dwarf explorers can be found in Vérnozal. You should give the crystal torches you forged to the dwarf explorers.
Rúzat can be found at Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rúzat.
